title: Inside Tesla as Elon Musk Pushed an Unflinching Vision for Self-Driving Cars
content: The automaker may have undermined safety in designing its Autopilot driver-assistance system to fit its chief executive’s vision, former employees say.

more_info.byline: By Cade Metz and Neal E. Boudette

en_title: Inside Tesla as Elon Musk Pushed an Unflinching Vision for Self-Driving Cars
en_content: The automaker may have undermined safety in designing its Autopilot driver-assistance system to fit its chief executive’s vision, former employees say.

title: How the Supply Chain Crisis Unfolded
content: The highly intricate and interconnected global supply chain is in upheaval, and in one way or another, much of the crisis can be traced to the outbreak of Covid-19.

more_info.byline: By Lazaro Gamio and Peter S. Goodman

en_title: How the Supply Chain Crisis Unfolded
en_content: The highly intricate and interconnected global supply chain is in upheaval, and in one way or another, much of the crisis can be traced to the outbreak of Covid-19.

title: This Chemical Is in Short Supply, and the Whole World Feels It
content: Farmers in India are desperate. Trucks in South Korea had to be idled. Food prices, already high, could rise even further.
en_title: This Chemical Is in Short Supply, and the Whole World Feels It
en_content: Farmers in India are desperate. Trucks in South Korea had to be idled. Food prices, already high, could rise even further.

title: In Its War on Covid-19, China Calls on ‘Little Inoculated Warriors’
content: The country regards children as crucial in its quest for herd immunity, but some parents, worried about the vaccines’ safety, are pushing back.

more_info.byline: By Alexandra Stevenson and Cao Li

en_title: In Its War on Covid-19, China Calls on ‘Little Inoculated Warriors’
en_content: The country regards children as crucial in its quest for herd immunity, but some parents, worried about the vaccines’ safety, are pushing back.

title: How TikTok Reads Your Mind
content: It’s the most successful video app in the world. Our columnist has obtained an internal company document that offers a new level of detail about how the algorithm works.
en_title: How TikTok Reads Your Mind

title: China Nears a Reckoning as Property Firms Face Tough Deadlines
content: Evergrande and Kaisa must come up with hundreds of millions of dollars in days. Beijing sought to reassure markets overall, but signaled it might let Evergrande fail.

en_title: China Nears a Reckoning as Property Firms Face Tough Deadlines

title: A Top SoftBank Executive Wants $2 Billion in Pay. His Boss Disagrees.
content: The SoftBank founder, Masayoshi Son, is locked in a dispute over compensation that his key deputy, Marcelo Claure, insists he should be paid.
en_title: A Top SoftBank Executive Wants $2 Billion in Pay. His Boss Disagrees.
en_content: The SoftBank founder, Masayoshi Son, is locked in a dispute over compensation that his key deputy, Marcelo Claure, insists he should be paid.

title: Condé Nast Knows Faded Glory Is Not in Style
content: Anna Wintour is the embodiment of the glory days of the magazine dynasty. Now she is pitching its global, digital future.
en_title: Condé Nast Knows Faded Glory Is Not in Style
en_content: Anna Wintour is the embodiment of the glory days of the magazine dynasty. Now she is pitching its global, digital future.

title: Exxon Mobil aims for net-zero emissions from its operations in the Permian Basin by 2030.
content: Exxon plans to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across its business, bit its goal does not include offsetting emissions from its customers, such as car and truck owners and airlines.
en_title: Exxon Mobil aims for net-zero emissions from its operations in the Permian Basin by 2030.
en_content: Exxon plans to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across its business, bit its goal does not include offsetting emissions from its customers, such as car and truck owners and airlines.

title: Donald Trump’s media company deal is being investigated by securities regulators.
content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority are scrutinizing the agreement to go public by merging with a so-called blank-check company.

more_info.byline: By Matthew Goldstein and David Enrich

en_title: Donald Trump’s media company deal is being investigated by securities regulators.
en_content: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority are scrutinizing the agreement to go public by merging with a so-called blank-check company.

title: BuzzFeed’s stock surges than falls in its public debut.
content: Other digital media groups are eyeing how BuzzFeed performs as a publicly traded company as they face a tough advertising climate and look for ways to pay back their early investors.

en_title: BuzzFeed’s stock surges than falls in its public debut.

title: Bitcoin plunges in weekend trading, with markets facing renewed volatility.

title: Patek Philippe’s Nautilus Watch Returns in Tiffany Blue

title: Ken Moffett, Top Federal Mediator and Union Official, Dies at 90
content: In the busy summer of 1981, he mediated labor disputes involving baseball players, postal workers and air traffic controllers. He later briefly ran the players’ union.
